originalTitle: Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 + Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
content: Join us on June 9 at 7am PT / 10am ET for Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 followed immediately by Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026. The livestream kicks off with Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026, which will run for roughly 50 minutes and highlight upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch games. Immediately following, Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026 will premiere and last around 95 minutes, showcasing gameplay of select titles featured during the Nintendo Direct. 00:00 - Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 56:36 - Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026 #NintendoDirect #NintendoTreehouseLive Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot Follow Nintendo of America X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAmerica Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/nintendo
chineseSummary: 美国任天堂 · 4,268,601 次观看
chineseContent: 请于 6 月 9 日上午 7 点（太平洋时间）/上午 10 点（东部时间）参加 Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026，紧随其后的是 Nintendo Treehouse：Live | 直播。 2026 年 6 月。直播以 Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 拉开帷幕，直播将持续约 50 分钟，重点介绍即将推出的 Nintendo Switch 2 和 Nintendo Switch 游戏。紧接着，任天堂树屋：现场 |将于 2026 年 6 月首播，持续约 95 分钟，展示 Nintendo Direct 期间精选游戏的游戏玩法。 00:00 - 任天堂直面 6.9.2026 56:36 - 任天堂树屋：直播 | 2026 年 6 月 #NintendoDirect #NintendoTreehouseLive 访问 Nintendo.com 了解更多信息：https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s 订阅更多任天堂乐趣：https://goo.gl/HYYsot 关注 Nintendo of America X/Twitter：https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAmerica Instagram： https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica Twitch：https://www.twitch.tv/nintendo
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
